documentation.justification: Partial checklist exists; last updated two owners ago.

decision_logic.justification: Discount-approval rule differs between two operators; ambiguity open (C-004).

data_dependencies.justification: Pricing sheet is an unversioned spreadsheet; remediation planned.

metrics_baseline.justification: Volume is owner recollection only (C-001); no cycle-time measure.

bottleneck_clarity.justification: Manager approval mapped but not yet classified structural vs incidental.

documentation.justification: Current SOP record completed to the twelve-section standard during the snapshot.

decision_logic.justification: Three-way-match rules externalized; both operators gave identical rules.

data_dependencies.justification: All inputs system-resident; no fragility flags on inspection.

metrics_baseline.justification: Cycle time inferred from a 20-run timestamp sample (C-005), not yet measured.

bottleneck_clarity.justification: Single approval step audited: 3 of last 50 approvals changed the outcome; classified structural (SoD).

documentation.justification: Owner states the SOP is current (C-006); not independently inspected.

decision_logic.justification: Restock-vs-scrap rule is tribal — resides with one senior operator.

data_dependencies.justification: RMA data re-keyed from email into the warehouse system.

metrics_baseline.justification: Volume and error rate measured from RMA log export (C-003).

bottleneck_clarity.justification: Queue at warehouse inspection mapped; classification pending wait-time data.
